_instructions: Human action required: Go to osf.io → create account → new project titled 'Cross-Family Interaction Matrix: Opponent-Contingent Behavioral Profiles in LLM Agents' → set visibility to public → upload docs/osf_preregistration.md → go to Registrations tab → New registration → template: Open-Ended Registration → upload doc → link GitHub repo → Submit registration. Then update this file with the project URL, registration URL, and registration ID.
